items.caption: A diagram illustrating the components of a local node in a network. it features a variety of devices and connections, including a radio, a laptop, a desktop pc, a router, and a cloud labeled "internet." the diagram also includes a text overlay that reads, "figure shows a typical local node and its components. this is what it is needed to create the local node." the style of the image is educational and informational, likely used for instructional purposes to explain the concept of a local node in a network.
